title: Nexus StrategyPatchPromptTemplateRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/strategies/{strategy_id}/states/{state_id}/prompt/patch (V1.71). Atomically updates a prompt-template file referenced by a state or inner-graph node inside the Strategy bundle.

strategy_id.description: Preset / Strategy identifier from the URL path. Must match the path parameter.

state_id.description: State identifier from the URL path.

base_revision.description: Revision observed by the client on the last canonical read.

template_ref.description: Relative path to the prompt template inside the bundle (e.g. prompts/outline-exit.md).

body.description: Complete replacement Markdown content of the prompt template.
